creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197952
patch

Per upstream (http://vtk.1045678.n5.nabble.com/Problem-with-building-VTK-td5742905.html), building using GCC 6 and newer is not supported, they advise using GCC 5. Use that to build this port on architectures using GCC, since build fails with GCC 7.

While here, add USES=gl.

Tested on powerpc64.

Hardware sponsored by IntegriCloud.
